languages.text: "Ясно. Ты лишь старик, живущий прошлым и стенающий о былом величии".
"I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
languages.original_text: "Ясно. Ты лишь старик, живущий прошлым и стенающий о былом величии".

traits.locale_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
"I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
"I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
"I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
"I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

languages.text: 「なるほど。あなたは過去に生きて、かつての栄光を嘆くだけの老人ですね。」
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど。あなたは過去に生きて、かつての栄光を嘆くだけの老人ですね。」

languages.text: “我明白了。你不过是个活在过去的老人，哀叹着自己早已褪色的荣光。”
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: “我明白了。你不过是个活在过去的老人，哀叹着自己早已褪色的荣光。”

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Sen sadece geçmişte yaşayan ve çoktan solup gitmiş ihtişamının yasını tutan ihtiyarın tekisin."
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Sen sadece geçmişte yaşayan ve çoktan solup gitmiş ihtişamının yasını tutan ihtiyarın tekisin."

languages.text: «Ya veo. No es más que un anciano que vive en el pasado y añora sus viejas glorias».
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: «Ya veo. No es más que un anciano que vive en el pasado y añora sus viejas glorias».

languages.text: « Je vois. Vous n'êtes qu'un vieillard qui vit dans le passé et se languit de sa gloire passée. »
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois. Vous n'êtes qu'un vieillard qui vit dans le passé et se languit de sa gloire passée. »

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Ihr seid nur ein alter Mann, der in der Vergangenheit lebt und seinem längst verblassten Ruhm nachweint."
languages.original_text: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Ihr seid nur ein alter Mann, der in der Vergangenheit lebt und seinem längst verblassten Ruhm nachweint."
